name: Middesk

developer_experience.reason: KYB API with good developer docs

description: Middesk — Business identity and KYB verification API providing tax ID validation, beneficial ownership, and business data.

seo.title: Middesk — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Middesk: Middesk — Business identity and KYB verification API providing tax ID validation, beneficial ownership, and business data.

when_to_use: Business identity verification via EIN and Secretary of State
Beneficial ownership check for CARES Act and bank KYB
Business address and registration status validation API
Automated KYB for BaaS and embedded finance onboarding
Merchant verification for marketplace and payments platforms

pros: Tax ID validation, UBO and business data in one API
US-focused coverage with strong registry data
Fast turnaround on EIN match and formation docs
cons: Per-verification pricing adds up at scale
Less depth on sanctions and adverse media
Not a full IDV stack for individuals
review.verdict: The default US KYB API for fintechs; expect to bolt on a KYC vendor and global registry source.
review.best_for: US fintechs, lenders and B2B platforms verifying business customers with EIN and UBO checks
review.not_for: Global KYB programs or teams needing consumer KYC and sanctions screening in one platform

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
